  Sealed.$clinit();
  let i = (() =>{
   let $selector = InternalPreconditions.m_checkNotNull__java_lang_Object__java_lang_Object($thisArg);
   let /** number */ $caseIndex;
   let /** A */ a, /** B */ b;
   if (A.$isInstance($selector) && (a = (/**@type {!A}*/ ($Casts.$to($selector, A))), true)) {
    $caseIndex = 0;
   } else if (B.$isInstance($selector) && (b = (/**@type {!B}*/ ($Casts.$to($selector, B))), true)) {
    $caseIndex = 1;
   } else {
    $caseIndex = 2;
   }
   switch ($caseIndex) {
    case 0:
     return 1;
    case 1:
     return 2;
    default:
     InternalPreconditions.m_checkExhaustive__void();
   }
  })();
 }

  Sealed.$clinit = () =>{};
  Sealed.$loadModules();
 }

  ctor.prototype.$implements__switchpatterns_SwitchPatterns_Sealed = true;
